{"step_by_step_thinking": "Antigens fibroblasts, bilayered cell therapy, and enamel matrix derivative are all terms related to active tissue engineering. Antigens fibroblasts refer to fibroblasts that can be used in tissue engineering. Bilayered cell therapy involves the use of two layers of cells, which is a technique in tissue engineering. Enamel matrix derivative is a biomaterial used in periodontal tissue engineering. On the other hand, acellular dermal matrix does not involve live cells and is more of a scaffold for tissue regeneration, thus it is not included in active tissue engineering.", "answer_choice": "D"}
